CRITICAL.name: data_freshness_breach
CRITICAL.message: The data pipeline has not processed data within the last 24 hours.
CRITICAL.recommended_action: Investigate and resolve the data pipeline failure immediately.

CRITICAL.name: data_quality_below_threshold
CRITICAL.message: The data quality has fallen below the required 99.9% threshold.
CRITICAL.recommended_action: Identify and rectify the data quality issues as a priority.

CRITICAL.name: row_count_out_of_bounds
CRITICAL.condition: Row count is outside the range of 17 to 25
CRITICAL.message: The row count is outside the acceptable range of 17 to 25.
CRITICAL.recommended_action: Check the data processing logic for any anomalies or errors.

WARNING.name: runtime_approaching_limit
WARNING.condition: Pipeline runtime is approaching the 120-minute limit
WARNING.message: The pipeline runtime is nearing the 120-minute limit.
WARNING.recommended_action: Monitor the pipeline runtime and optimize if necessary to avoid breaching the limit.

WARNING.name: data_quality_slightly_below
WARNING.condition: Data quality percentage is slightly below 99.9%
WARNING.message: The data quality is slightly below the required 99.9% threshold.
WARNING.recommended_action: Investigate the slight dip in data quality and take corrective action if needed.

WARNING.name: merchant_failure_spike
WARNING.condition: A merchant's failure rate spikes above 30%
WARNING.message: A merchant's failure rate has spiked above the 30% threshold.
WARNING.recommended_action: Investigate the cause of the failure spike for the affected merchant.

INFO.name: new_payment_method_detected
INFO.condition: A new payment method is detected in the data
INFO.message: A new payment method has been detected in the data.
INFO.recommended_action: Verify the new payment method and update the system if necessary.

INFO.name: row_count_near_bounds
INFO.condition: Daily row count is near the lower or upper bounds
INFO.message: The daily row count is near the lower or upper bounds of 17 or 25.
INFO.recommended_action: Monitor the row count to ensure it remains within the acceptable range.
